methods.name: createApplication

args.name: deadlineRound
args.desc: - Algorand round after which escrow expires

args.name: requirementsHash
args.desc: - SHA256 of requirements text (freelance only, else empty)

args.name: treasury
args.desc: - Platform treasury address that receives fees

methods.desc:
Called by EscrowFactory via inner application create transaction.
Sets up all initial escrow metadata.
